revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:富士見工業団地]]
{{Referencesの明記|date=2023rd year 1月2日 (月) 07:44 (UTC)}} '''Fujimi Industrial Park''' (富士見工業団地) is an {{ill|industrial park|ja|工業団地|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/industrial park|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=Industrial estate|qid=Q329683}} spanning {{ill|Kawagoe, Saitama|en|Kawagoe, Saitama|qid=Q319740|lt=Kawagoe, Saitama|1=Kawagoe, Saitama}}, {{ill|Sakado, Saitama|en|Sakado, Saitama|qid=Q850344|lt=Sakado, Saitama|1=Sakado, Saitama}}, and {{ill|Tsurugashima, Saitama|en|Tsurugashima, Saitama|qid=Q869027|lt=Tsurugashima, Saitama|1=Tsurugashima, Saitama}} in {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.
The park is located about one kilometer down Wakabadai Street, which extends straight from the east exit of {{ill|Wakaba Station|en|Wakaba Station|qid=Q7960744|lt=Wakaba Station|1=Wakaba Station}} on the {{ill|Tōbu Tōjō Line|en|Tōbu Tōjō Line|qid=Q1040703|lt=Tobu Tojo Line|1=Tōbu Tōjō Line}}, with factories and facilities lining both sides. The roads are laid out to form almost perfect rectangular blocks of land. The area includes the site of the former {{ill|Sakado Airfield|ja|坂戸飛行場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakado Airfield|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, once used by the {{ill|Imperial Japanese Army|en|Imperial Japanese Army|qid=Q276535|lt=Imperial Japanese Army|1=Imperial Japanese Army}}.
== Major Companies Located == * {{ill|Heiwa Shokuhin Kogyo Co., Ltd.|ja|平和食品工業|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Heiwa Shokuhin Kogyo Co., Ltd.|1=Heiwa Foods Industry|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11482276}} Sakado Plant * Shin Ryutsu Soko Co., Ltd. * Aiko Co., Ltd. * {{ill|Mishima Foods|ja|三島食品|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mishima Foods|1=Mishima Foods|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11355291}} Kanto Plant * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} Confectionery Development Research Center (formerly the Pioneer Comprehensive Research Center site) * [https://jpn.pioneer/ja/corp/group/pioneerfinetech/ Pioneer Fine Tech Co., Ltd.] * {{ill|Mitsubishi Shokuhin|ja|三菱食品|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mitsubishi Shokuhin|1=Mitsubishi Shokuhin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11357186}} Sakado Liquor Distribution Center * [http://www.fec.sakado.co.jp/ Fuji Electronics Co., Ltd.] * {{ill|Omron|en|Omron|qid=Q501376|lt=Omron|1=Omron}} Precision Technology * {{ill|Kyo Printing|ja|共同印刷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyo Printing|1=Kyodo Printing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11392639}} Tsurugashima Plant * {{ill|Kato Precision Railroad Models|en|Kato Precision Railroad Models|qid=Q1407078|lt=Kansui Kinzoku|1=Kato Precision Railroad Models}} Saitama Plant * {{ill|Tamura Corporation|ja|タムラ製作所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamura Corporation|1=Tamura Corporation|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11316348}} * {{ill|Toyo Ink|ja|東洋インキ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyo Ink|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to Artience|1=artience|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11527588}} Saitama Manufacturing Site * [https://www.conlux.co.jp/ Nippon Conlux Co., Ltd.] * [https://www.bushu-pharma.com/ Bushu Pharmaceuticals] * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} Sakado Plant (formerly Meiji Seika Kanto Plant, includes Food Comprehensive Research Center) * [https://www.nitto-inc.co.jp/ Nitto Co., Ltd.] * {{ill|Nihon Kohden|en|Nihon Kohden|qid=Q11507280|lt=Nihon Kohden Corporation|1=Nihon Kohden}} Tsurugashima Office * {{ill|Hitachi Document Solutions|ja|日立ドキュメントソリューションズ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hitachi Document Solutions|1=Hitachi Document Solutions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q17224720}} * {{ill|Bushu Gas|ja|武州ガス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bushu Gas|1=Bushu Gas|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545956}} * [http://www.optorun.co.jp/ Optorun Co., Ltd.] * [https://okuigumi.co.jp/ Okuigumi Co., Ltd.]
== External Links == * [http://www.f-kogyokai.jp/ Fujimi Industrial Park Industry Association]
